Hello Coins.learn: Money comes as coins and notes. We use it to trade for things people make and sell.
Hello Coins.apply: Find three coins or notes at home and name what each could buy.

quiz.prompt: Where does money usually live safely?

Needs First.learn: Needs keep you healthy and safe — food, shelter, and school supplies come first.
Needs First.apply: Name one need you covered today before any fun spending.

Want Later.learn: Wants are fun but optional — they can wait until needs and savings are covered.
Want Later.apply: Pick one want and write why it can wait until next week.

quiz.prompt: You see a toy and lunch. Pick first.

Coin Count.learn: Adding small piles of coins quickly shows how much you really have to spend.
Coin Count.apply: Count coins in one jar and write the total in AED.

First Choice.learn: Your first money choice sets a habit — pick the option that matches your goal.
First Choice.apply: Make one small spend today and explain why it was smart.

Needs vs Wants.learn: Needs keep you going; wants are extras. Spot the difference before you spend.
Needs vs Wants.apply: Sort one purchase today into need or want.

quiz.prompt: Water on a hot day is a…

Saving Jar.learn: A saving jar holds coins for a goal — watching it grow builds patience.
Saving Jar.apply: Name a goal and move AED 2 into your jar today.

Smart Spending.learn: Compare options before you buy — same item, different shops, different prices.
Smart Spending.apply: Check two prices for one item you want this week.

Budget Basics.learn: A weekly budget lists money in and out — plan AED before you spend it.
Budget Basics.apply: Write a simple AED plan for this week with one need and one save line.

quiz.prompt: Plan your AED for the week means…

Cost of Goods.learn: Making something costs materials and time — that is the cost of goods.
Cost of Goods.apply: List two costs to make one lemonade cup at a stand.

quiz.prompt: If lemons cost AED 2, that is…

Profit = Revenue − Cost.learn: Revenue is money in from sales; cost is money out; profit is what remains.
Profit = Revenue − Cost.apply: Run Lemon City — price above cost to earn on each cup.

quiz.prompt: To earn profit, price must be…

Compare Prices.learn: The same item can cost different amounts — compare shops before you pay.
Compare Prices.apply: Check two prices for one snack online or in a store.

Wait a Day.learn: Sleep on big wants — tomorrow you may not want it as much.
Wait a Day.apply: Write one want you will wait 24 hours before buying.

quiz.prompt: Waiting a day before buying helps…

quiz.correct: Decide you do not need it

Deal Detective.learn: Spot real vs fake deals — check the original price and the fine print.
Deal Detective.apply: Find a “sale” sign and verify the price before and after the discount.

quiz.correct: Make you spend more than planned
You pay less than usual for same item

Shopping List.learn: A shopping list keeps you on plan — stick to it to avoid surprise spending.
Shopping List.apply: Write a list before your next shop trip and follow it.

quiz.prompt: A shopping list stops you from…

Small Budget.learn: AED 20 for the week means every dirham has a job — plan before spending.
Small Budget.apply: Split AED 20 into needs, wants, and save on paper.

Spend Smart.learn: Every dirham has a job — spend, save, or give on purpose.
Spend Smart.apply: Give each AED in your allowance a job on paper tonight.

quiz.prompt: Every dirham has a job means…

Week Plan.learn: Split money into buckets — needs, wants, and savings for the week.
Week Plan.apply: Draw three jars and label them for this week.

quiz.prompt: A week plan splits money into…

Track Spend.learn: Write what you buy — tracking shows where AED really goes.
Track Spend.apply: Log three purchases today with amounts in AED.

Oops Fix.learn: Overspending happens — adjust other buckets and learn for next time.
Oops Fix.apply: If you overspent this week, move AED from wants to needs on paper.

Needs Bucket.learn: Protect essentials first — the needs bucket covers food, school, and shelter items.
Needs Bucket.apply: List three needs your bucket must cover this week.

Review Day.learn: Look back and learn — review day asks if you followed your plan.
Review Day.apply: Answer: Did I follow my plan? Write one sentence why or why not.

Goal Glow.learn: Name your saving dream — specific goals glow brighter when you track them.
Goal Glow.apply: Write one savings goal with a date and AED target.

Jar Rules.learn: Every coin has a job — jar rules split spend, save, and give clearly.
Jar Rules.apply: Label jars: Spend, Save, Give — move today’s coins accordingly.

Stand Setup.learn: Cost to make one cup includes lemons, sugar, cups, and your time.
Stand Setup.apply: List every cost for one lemonade cup before setting price.

quiz.prompt: Your time at the stand is…

Price Pick.learn: Pick a price customers will pay but still covers your cost plus profit.
Price Pick.apply: Test two prices — which earns profit without scaring customers away?

Busy Day.learn: Serve more customers when demand is high — busy days boost revenue.
Busy Day.apply: In Lemon City, try a busier day with fair pricing.

quiz.prompt: More cups sold at profit means…

Profit Smile.learn: Revenue minus cost equals profit — smile when the number is positive.
Profit Smile.apply: Calculate profit for one Lemon City day in AED.

Reinvest.learn: Put some profit back into the business — better cups or more lemons grow sales.
Reinvest.apply: Choose one reinvestment that could earn more next week.

quiz.correct: Items that boost sales or cut cost

Interest Intro.learn: Interest is money growing slowly when savings stay in a bank.
Interest Intro.apply: Ask a parent how savings can earn small interest over time.

Rainy Day.learn: Save for surprises — a rainy-day fund covers emergencies without panic.
Rainy Day.apply: Move AED 2 into savings this week for a surprise.

Plan Steps.learn: Break big goals into small steps — each step gets a date and AED amount.
Plan Steps.apply: Split one big goal into three weekly steps.

Future You.learn: Thank yourself later — choices today help future you stay calm and ready.
Future You.apply: Write a note to future you about one smart money choice you made.

Ad Alert.learn: Not every sale is real — ads make wants feel urgent; pause and compare.
Ad Alert.apply: Spot one ad today and ask: need or want?

Quality Check.learn: Cheap vs worth it — lowest price fails if the item breaks fast.
Quality Check.apply: Compare two similar items: price, reviews, and expected life.

Review Read.learn: Ask before you buy — read reviews to learn from others’ experience.
Review Read.apply: Find two reviews for something you might buy.

Return Rules.learn: Know store policies — return rules let you fix mistakes safely.
Return Rules.apply: Check return policy for one shop you use often.

Scam Shield.learn: Too-good offers trick us — scam shield means verify before you pay.
Scam Shield.apply: Learn one sign of an online scam and share with a parent.

Split Fair.learn: Share costs with friends fairly — everyone pays their agreed share.
Split Fair.apply: Plan a group snack and split costs evenly or by what each ordered.

Group Goal.learn: Save together for fun — group goals work when everyone agrees on the target.
Group Goal.apply: Set a small group savings goal with friends or family.

Talk Money.learn: Kind honest conversations about money build trust with family and friends.
Talk Money.apply: Ask one money question to a parent or teacher today.

Team Budget.learn: Plan a class project budget — list costs, split tasks, track totals.
Team Budget.apply: Draft a team budget for a small project with three line items.

Win Together.learn: Celebrate group success — winning together means everyone followed the plan.
Win Together.apply: Thank one teammate for helping the budget stay on track.

Master Mix.learn: Blend all your skills — saving, spending, investing, and giving work together.
Master Mix.apply: Pick one real decision this week and write pros and cons.

Real Scenario.learn: Choose in a tough moment — weigh options, not just feelings.
Real Scenario.apply: Describe one tough money choice and what you picked.

Give & Grow.learn: Charity with a plan — give thoughtfully without hurting your goals.
Give & Grow.apply: Choose a small give amount that fits your save/spend plan.

Seed Invest.learn: Plant money like a seed — investing is delayed reward with risk and time.
Seed Invest.apply: Learn one safe way kids can think about long-term investing.

quiz.correct: Value can go up or down

Portfolio Play.learn: Spread risk wisely — do not put every dirham in one place.
Portfolio Play.apply: Sketch three buckets: save, invest learning, spend — with percentages.

quiz.correct: Not putting all eggs in one basket

Tax Basics.learn: Some money goes to taxes — they fund roads, schools, and public services.
Tax Basics.apply: Ask a parent what taxes pay for in your community.

Side Hustle.learn: Earn beyond allowance — small jobs teach work, pricing, and responsibility.
Side Hustle.apply: List one safe side hustle you could try with a parent’s OK.

Negotiate.learn: Ask for fair value — polite negotiation is part of real-world money.
Negotiate.apply: Role-play asking for fair pay on a small job with a parent.

Lead & Teach.learn: Help others learn — sharing what you know makes the whole team stronger.
Lead & Teach.apply: Teach one money tip you learned to a friend or sibling.

Big Decision.learn: Weigh every option — big decisions need time, research, and advice.
Big Decision.apply: Use a pros/cons list for one decision you face this month.

Graduation.learn: Chief Money Officer — you blend saving, spending, investing, giving, and leading.
Graduation.apply: Write your personal money pledge for the next year.

Stand Setup.learn: Unit economics start with **COGS**: every dirham spent on lemons, cups, ice, and your time to make one sellable cup.
Stand Setup.apply: Build a one-cup P&L: list materials, estimate minutes, assign AED cost per cup before pricing.

quiz.prompt: Lemons AED 6 + cups AED 4 for 10 drinks. COGS per drink?
Ignoring your time in COGS leads to…
Costs jumped 20%. Your gut says keep old price. You should…
Cost AED 2.50/cup. Sell 8 at AED 4. Total profit?

Price Pick.learn: Pricing is a signal: too low erodes margin; too high kills volume. Find the band where customers say yes and you stay profitable.
Price Pick.apply: Survey three friends: highest price they would pay for your cup; compare to your unit cost + target margin.

quiz.prompt: Unit cost AED 3. Target 25% margin on price. Minimum price?
Customers hesitate at AED 6 but buy at AED 5. You feel pressure to drop. Best move?
quiz.correct: Test value — maybe bundle or smaller size

quiz.prompt: Cost AED 2, price AED 5, 6 cups sold. Profit?

Busy Day.learn: Throughput day: when demand spikes, revenue scales only if you prepared stock and kept price above COGS on every cup.
Busy Day.apply: Plan a “busy day” checklist: max cups you can serve, prep time, and minimum price that holds margin at peak volume.

quiz.prompt: COGS AED 2. Price AED 4. 15 cups sold. Profit?
Running out of cups mid-rush means…
Rush feels chaotic. Price drifts down to “move cups.” You should…
Prep 20 cups, sell 14 at AED 5 (COGS AED 2). Profit?

Profit Smile.learn: P&L in one line: **Profit = Revenue − COGS (and overhead)**. Positive profit funds reinvest and savings.
Profit Smile.apply: After Lemon City, write revenue, total COGS, and profit in AED — one sentence on what you would change.

quiz.prompt: High revenue with negative profit means…
You feel great about sales but wallet is flat. Likely cause?
COGS AED 3/cup × 10 cups. Revenue AED 55. Profit?

Reinvest.learn: Retained earnings fuel growth: reinvest profit into better tools, bulk supplies, or marketing that lowers COGS or lifts sales.
Reinvest.apply: Pick one reinvestment under AED 50 that could lower cost per cup or attract more customers next week.

quiz.correct: Lower COGS or increase qualified demand

quiz.prompt: Profit AED 40. Reinvest AED 25 in bulk lemons (saves AED 0.50/cup). Break-even cups to recover?
Reinvesting all profit with zero emergency fund…
Friend says spend profit on sneakers now. You want growth. You…
AED 30 profit → AED 20 better sign, AED 10 save. Next month sign lifts sales 15%. This is…

Interest Intro.learn: Compound interest: savings earn a percentage over time — money makes money when left in a regulated account.
Interest Intro.apply: Use a calculator: AED 100 at 4% annual for 1 year — estimate interest earned (simple, not compound).

quiz.correct: Payment for letting bank use your money

quiz.prompt: AED 200 at 5% simple interest 1 year earns…
Compound vs simple: compound pays interest on…
Friend wants to “invest” in a random app promising 50%/week. You feel FOMO. Best step?
Goal AED 500 in 10 months. Save AED 50/month. Interest small. On track?

Rainy Day.learn: Emergency fund: 3–6 months of essential expenses in accessible savings — shocks happen (repairs, medical, job loss).
Rainy Day.apply: Estimate your share of monthly essentials in AED; set a first milestone at one week of essentials.

quiz.prompt: Essentials AED 400/month. Starter goal = 1 week. Target?
Investing emergency fund in volatile crypto…
Phone breaks — repair AED 350. No fund. You feel stressed. Lesson?
Income AED 200/month. Save AED 40/month to e-fund. Months to AED 200?

Plan Steps.learn: SMART goals decompose: Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, Time-bound — break AED targets into weekly deposits.
Plan Steps.apply: Convert one big goal (e.g. AED 600 laptop) into 12 weekly AED amounts; note start date.

quiz.prompt: AED 480 in 12 weeks requires weekly save of…
Missing a weekly deposit should trigger…
Goal feels far away — motivation dips. Best habit?
AED 300 goal, 10 weeks left, AED 120 saved. Weekly need?

Future You.learn: Intertemporal choice: spending now vs. investing in future you — education, skills, and savings compound over decades.
Future You.apply: Write a 3-line letter from “future you at 25” thanking present you for one money habit you start today.

quiz.prompt: AED 50/month invested 5 years beats one AED 300 splurge because…
Opportunity cost of AED 200 sneakers today might be…
Peer pressure to spend on nights out. Future-you voice says…
Pick one: AED 30/week save vs. random AED 120/month. Better for habit?

Ad Alert.learn: Performance marketing targets your dopamine — “limited time” and influencer codes are designed to bypass your budget.
Ad Alert.apply: Screenshot one ad; list three tactics it uses (urgency, social proof, discount framing).

quiz.prompt: Drop feels irresistible at midnight. Budget says wait. You…
AED 199 “sale” item was AED 189 last month. This is…

Quality Check.learn: Total cost of ownership: cheap upfront + short life can beat “premium” — calculate cost per use or per year.
Quality Check.apply: Compare two headphones: price ÷ expected months of use = monthly cost.

quiz.prompt: AED 60 item lasting 2 years vs AED 30 lasting 4 months. Cheaper per month?
“Too cheap to be true” often means…
You regret cheap shoes after 2 weeks. Emotion?
AED 120 jacket, 3 winters. AED 40 jacket, 1 winter. Cost per winter?
quiz.correct: AED 40 vs AED 40 — tie on paper; check comfort

Review Read.learn: Crowd wisdom is noisy — weight verified purchases, detailed pros/cons, and photos over star spam.
Review Read.apply: Read 5 reviews for one product; note one red flag and one green flag.

quiz.prompt: Reviews say “great” but photos show damage. You feel uneasy. Trust…
Before AED 400 purchase, minimum research time?

Return Rules.learn: Consumer rights vary by retailer — know return window, restocking fees, and condition rules before big buys.
Return Rules.apply: Find return policy for a store you use; note days, receipt need, and refund type.

quiz.correct: Have restocking fee or shorter window

quiz.prompt: Final sale tag makes you nervous. You should…
Online return: who pays shipping back?
quiz.correct: Check policy — often buyer unless defective

Scam Shield.learn: Social engineering: urgency + secrecy + irreversible payment (gift cards, crypto, wire) = scam pattern.
Scam Shield.apply: Review UAE/common scam signs with a parent; agree on a code word before sending money online.

quiz.prompt: Too-good job paying AED 500/day for clicks…
Pressure + secrecy (“don’t tell parents”) feels wrong. You…

quiz.correct: Use official app, not random links

Split Fair.learn: Cost allocation in groups: agree method upfront — equal split, by item, or by income share.
Split Fair.apply: Plan a AED 120 group meal; assign who pays what before ordering.

quiz.prompt: Three friends, unequal orders. Fairest default?
Someone cannot pay share. Group should…
You ordered less but feel guilty. Emotion vs math?
AED 90 bill, you ate AED 25. Others split rest. Your share?

Group Goal.learn: Shared sinking fund: transparent ledger, deadline, and what happens if someone drops out.
Group Goal.apply: Draft group trip fund: target AED, weekly deposit per person, treasurer role.

quiz.correct: Talk early — adjust or exit rule

quiz.prompt: AED 600 goal, 4 people, 10 weeks. Each per week?

Talk Money.learn: Financial transparency with friends reduces conflict — discuss budgets before plans, not after the bill.
Talk Money.apply: Before next outing, message: “My budget is AED X — what works for you?”

quiz.prompt: Friend spends freely; you cannot. Healthy response?
Group chat plans expensive trip. You feel anxious. First step?
quiz.correct: Share your range privately or in chat

Team Budget.learn: Project budget: line items, owners, contingency (10–15%), and sign-off before spending club/class funds.
Team Budget.apply: Budget a AED 500 class event: venue, food, materials, buffer — assign owners.

quiz.prompt: AED 500 budget, 10% buffer reserved. Spendable plan?
No owner on a line item means…
Mid-project overrun on food. Team should…
quiz.correct: Use buffer or trim another line

Win Together.learn: Close the loop: retrospective on budget vs actual, thank contributors, document lessons for next event.
Win Together.apply: After a group project, run 15-min retro: what worked, what cost surprised us.

quiz.prompt: Leftover AED 40 in club fund should…
Team tension after overspend. Leader should…

Master Mix.learn: Personal finance stack: earn → budget → save → invest → protect → give — tune weights to life stage.
Master Mix.apply: Draw your money stack with % targets for each layer this month.

quiz.prompt: Income AED 800/month. Needs 50%, save 20%, invest learning 10%, fun 20%. Fun AED?
Every dirham perfect stress. Healthier view?

Real Scenario.learn: Decision matrix: list options, score impact on goals, risk, and reversibility — then choose.
Real Scenario.apply: Apply a 3-column matrix to one real choice: buy used phone now vs. save 2 more months.

quiz.prompt: Option A: AED 200 now. Option B: AED 240 in 3 months with save plan. Matrix checks…
Sunk cost fallacy: keeping bad purchase because…
Pressure to decide in 5 minutes on AED 2000 laptop. You…
quiz.correct: Walk away — high stakes need time

Give & Grow.learn: Effective altruism lite: give with intention — % of income, vetted causes, tax-aware where applicable.
Give & Grow.apply: Pick a cause; set give cap (e.g. 3% of allowance) that does not break emergency fund.

quiz.prompt: Income AED 400, give cap 5%. Max give/month?
Friend fundraises; you are tight this month. You…
quiz.correct: Small amount or honest “not this month”

Seed Invest.learn: Risk/return tradeoff: diversified low-cost index concepts beat stock-picking for most beginners.
Seed Invest.apply: Read one page on diversification; list three asset types (cash, bonds, equities).

quiz.prompt: Emergency fund before aggressive invest because…
quiz.correct: Avoid selling at loss in shock

quiz.prompt: Friend mocks “boring” index fund. You feel FOMO on meme stock. You…

Portfolio Play.learn: Asset allocation by age/goals: younger long horizon → higher equity share; near goal → shift to stability.
Portfolio Play.apply: Sketch sample split for age 16 vs age 60 (not advice — learning exercise).

quiz.prompt: High fee fund 2%/year vs index 0.2% over decades…
Market drops 15%; panic sell everything. Better CMO move?
quiz.correct: Review plan — maybe hold if horizon long

quiz.prompt: Goal in 2 years (laptop fund) should be mostly…

Tax Basics.learn: Tax funds public goods — income/VAT concepts; keep records if you earn beyond allowance.
Tax Basics.apply: With a parent, find one public service taxes fund in your emirate.

quiz.prompt: “Cash only so no tax” from friend sounds…

Side Hustle.learn: Micro-business: validate demand, price above cost, track revenue/expense, comply with family/school rules.
Side Hustle.apply: Draft one-page hustle plan: offer, price, cost, hours, parent approval checkbox.

quiz.prompt: Hustle grows; school suffers. Balance move?

Negotiate.learn: BATNA: Best Alternative To Negotiated Agreement — know your walk-away before talking price.
Negotiate.apply: Role-play tutoring rate: your cost (time), market rate, minimum acceptable.

quiz.correct: Your best option if deal fails

quiz.prompt: Employer offers AED 40/hr; your BATNA is AED 35 elsewhere. Leverage?
Pressure “sign now or lose offer.” You feel rushed. You…
quiz.correct: Ask time to review — legit offers wait

Lead & Teach.learn: Teaching solidifies mastery — explain concepts simply (Feynman) to spot gaps in your own understanding.
Lead & Teach.apply: Teach a younger sibling “profit = revenue − cost” with a 3-minute example.

quiz.prompt: Peer asks risky “investment.” You lead by…

Big Decision.learn: Major forks (university path, first car, gap year) need multi-criteria analysis + advisor input.
Big Decision.apply: List 3 criteria for one big decision; score two options 1–5 each.

quiz.prompt: AED 15,000 over 4 years vs AED 25,000 over 2 years — compare…
Fear of missing out on path friends chose. You…

Graduation.learn: Chief Money Officer pledge: continuous learning, ethical earning, transparent giving, and calm under market noise.
Graduation.apply: Write your CMO pledge: 3 habits you keep, 2 you stop, 1 person you will mentor.

quiz.prompt: Calm under noise (hype, crashes) comes from…

quiz.correct: Apply stack in real adult milestones
